'''dhobapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zincous|zincous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zincous|zincous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhobapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobapithi|dhobapithi]] || [[word:dhobapiji|dhobapiji]] || [[word:dhobapishi|dhobapishi]] || [[word:dhobapiki|dhobapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobaputhuthu|dhobaputhuthu]] || [[word:dhobapujuju|dhobapujuju]] || [[word:dhobapushushu|dhobapushushu]] || [[word:dhobapukuku|dhobapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobaputhu|dhobaputhu]] || [[word:dhobapuju|dhobapuju]] || [[word:dhobapushu|dhobapushu]] || [[word:dhobapuku|dhobapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobapufthuf|dhobapufthuf]] || [[word:dhobapufjuf|dhobapufjuf]] || [[word:dhobapufshuf|dhobapufshuf]] || [[word:dhobapufkuf|dhobapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobapethe|dhobapethe]] || [[word:dhobapeje|dhobapeje]] || [[word:dhobapeshe|dhobapeshe]] || [[word:dhobapeke|dhobapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobapothotho|dhobapothotho]] || [[word:dhobapojojo|dhobapojojo]] || [[word:dhobaposhosho|dhobaposhosho]] || [[word:dhobapokoko|dhobapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobapotho|dhobapotho]] || [[word:dhobapojo|dhobapojo]] || [[word:dhobaposho|dhobaposho]] || [[word:dhobapoko|dhobapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobapofthof|dhobapofthof]] || [[word:dhobapofjof|dhobapofjof]] || [[word:dhobapofshof|dhobapofshof]] || [[word:dhobapofkof|dhobapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfthĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfjĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfshĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfkĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfthĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfjĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfshĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfkĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfthĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfjĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfshĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhobapĂŻfkĂŻf|dhobapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhobapĂŠthĂŠ|dhobapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhobapĂŠjĂŠ|dhobapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhobapĂŠshĂŠ|dhobapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhobapĂŠkĂŠ|dhobapĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhobapathatha|dhobapathatha]] || [[word:dhobapajaja|dhobapajaja]] || [[word:dhobapashasha|dhobapashasha]] || [[word:dhobapakaka|dhobapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhobapatha|dhobapatha]] || [[word:dhobapaja|dhobapaja]] || [[word:dhobapasha|dhobapasha]] || [[word:dhobapaka|dhobapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhobapafthaf|dhobapafthaf]] || [[word:dhobapafjaf|dhobapafjaf]] || [[word:dhobapafshaf|dhobapafshaf]] || [[word:dhobapafkaf|dhobapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhobapasha|dhobapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhobapshĂ«sha|dhobapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhobaprosha|dhobaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhobapmusha|dhobapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhobapyasha|dhobapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhobapnkshĂ«sha|godhobapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhobapnkrosha|godhobapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhobapnkmusha|godhobapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhobapnkyasha|godhobapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhobabapasha|dhobabapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhobabapshĂ«sha|dhobabapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhobabaprosha|dhobabaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhobabapmusha|dhobabapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhobabapyasha|dhobabapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhobabapnkshĂ«sha|godhobabapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhobabapnkrosha|godhobabapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhobabapnkmusha|godhobabapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhobabapnkyasha|godhobabapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhebĂŠpasha|dhebĂŠpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhebĂŠpshĂ«sha|dhebĂŠpshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhebĂŠprosha|dhebĂŠprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhebĂŠpmusha|dhebĂŠpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhebĂŠpyasha|dhebĂŠpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhebĂŠpnkshĂ«sha|godhebĂŠpnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhebĂŠpnkrosha|godhebĂŠpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhebĂŠpnkmusha|godhebĂŠpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhebĂŠpnkyasha|godhebĂŠpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhobfapasha|dhobfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhobfapshĂ«sha|dhobfapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhobfaprosha|dhobfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhobfapmusha|dhobfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhobfapyasha|dhobfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhobfapnkshĂ«sha|godhobfapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhobfapnkrosha|godhobfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhobfapnkmusha|godhobfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhobfapnkyasha|godhobfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
